summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 refactored page components (PropertiesPage, LeadsPage, HousekeepingPage) after massive code split. All pages load correctly and all interactive elements work as expected. No issues found.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 refactored pages (Properties, Leads, Housekeeping) render correctly after component extraction
PropertyCard, PropertyFormDialog, UnitFormDialog components work correctly
LeadRow, LeadFormDialog, NotificationDialogs components work correctly with proper strength colors and stage indicators
CleaningEditDialog, ManualCleaningDialog, housekeepingUtils components work correctly
All data-testid attributes are properly set for testing
Tab switching on Housekeeping page works correctly between Upcoming Cleanings, Current Housekeepers, and Housekeeping Leads
passed_tests: Properties page loads at /properties with property list displayed (7 properties found)
Properties page: Add Property button opens PropertyFormDialog with all fields
Properties page: Edit button opens PropertyFormDialog pre-filled with property data
Properties page: Delete button visible on property cards
Properties page: Property Details toggle expands to show owner/manager info, parking, pets, Marlins Decal
Properties page: Units toggle expands to show units table with Add Unit button
Properties page: Add Unit button opens UnitFormDialog with all fields
Leads page loads at /leads with leads list displayed (5 leads found)
Leads page: Leads grouped by property (1144, 2153) and Unassigned Leads section
Leads page: Add Lead button opens LeadFormDialog with all fields
Leads page: Edit button opens LeadFormDialog pre-filled with lead data
Leads page: LeadRow displays correct strength colors (Weak=red, Fair=orange, Strong=green)
Leads page: Progress indicators and stage names visible on lead rows
Leads page: Advance Stage (Next) button visible on lead rows
Housekeeping page loads at /ops/housekeeping with all 3 tabs
Housekeeping page: Upcoming Cleanings tab shows table with filter/search inputs
Housekeeping page: Add Manual Cleaning button opens ManualCleaningDialog
Housekeeping page: Clicking cleaning row opens CleaningEditDialog
Housekeeping page: Current Housekeepers tab shows housekeepers list with Add/Archive buttons
Housekeeping page: Add Housekeeper button opens dialog with all fields
Housekeeping page: Housekeeping Leads tab shows leads list with Add/Archive buttons
Housekeeping page: Add Lead button opens dialog with all fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 refactored pages tested successfully. Key data-testids: properties-create-button, property-edit-button, property-delete-button, property-details-toggle, property-units-toggle, units-create-button, leads-create-button, leads-table-row, leads-stage-advance-button, housekeeping-page-title, housekeeping-tabs, hk-tab-upcoming, hk-tab-housekeepers, hk-tab-leads, add-manual-cleaning-btn, cleaning-row, hk-add-btn, hk-lead-add-btn. Components extracted: PropertyCard, PropertyFormDialog, UnitFormDialog, LeadRow, LeadFormDialog, NotificationDialogs, CleaningEditDialog, ManualCleaningDialog, housekeepingUtils.
